name: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2
description: The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 is the ultimate esports mouse, weighing under 60 grams with the HERO 2 sensor for precise tracking up to 44,000 DPI. Features LIGHTFORCE hybrid switches and LIGHTSPEED wireless technology for tournament-grade performance.
features: PTFE mouse feet for smooth glide

name: Razer Deathadder V3
description: The Razer DeathAdder V3 features the iconic ergonomic design refined for competitive play. Equipped with the Focus Pro 30K optical sensor and weighing just 59g, it delivers elite-level precision and comfort for marathon gaming sessions.

name: Razer Basilisk V3
description: The Razer Basilisk V3 is a highly ergonomic gaming mouse with a customizable scroll wheel and 11 programmable buttons. The Focus Pro 26K sensor delivers flawless tracking while the Chroma RGB lighting adds immersive flair to your setup.

name: Logitech G102 LightSync
description: The Logitech G102 LightSync is an affordable gaming mouse with the trusted Logitech G gaming sensor. With 6 programmable buttons and customizable RGB lighting, it's the perfect entry-level gaming mouse.

name: Razer Cobra
description: The Razer Cobra is a lightweight ambidextrous gaming mouse built for speed and precision. Featuring the Focus Pro 30K sensor and optical switches, it delivers tournament-ready performance in a compact form factor.

name: Logitech G915 X Lightspeed
description: The Logitech G915 X is a premium wireless mechanical gaming keyboard with ultra-thin design and low-profile GL switches. Features LIGHTSPEED wireless technology and LIGHTSYNC RGB for a high-end gaming experience.

name: Razer BlackWidow V4 TKL HyperSpeed
description: The Razer BlackWidow V4 TKL HyperSpeed delivers pro-level performance in a compact tenkeyless form factor. Featuring Razer Orange mechanical switches and HyperSpeed wireless technology for competitive gaming.

name: Logitech G515 Rapid TKL
description: The Logitech G515 Rapid TKL is a compact tenkeyless keyboard designed for esports athletes. With low-profile GL switches and LIGHTSPEED wireless, it offers blazing-fast performance in a space-saving layout.

name: Razer Ornata V3 X
description: The Razer Ornata V3 X features Razer Mecha-Membrane switches that combine the soft cushioned touch of a membrane keyboard with the satisfying click of a mechanical switch. Perfect for gamers seeking a unique typing experience.

name: HyperX Cloud III
description: The HyperX Cloud III builds on the legendary Cloud series with premium comfort and immersive audio. 53mm drivers deliver rich sound while the memory foam ear cushions provide exceptional comfort for long gaming sessions.

name: Razer BlackShark V2 X
description: The Razer BlackShark V2 X is an esports headset designed for competitive gaming. With lightweight construction and 50mm drivers, it delivers clear audio and comfortable wear during intense gaming sessions.

name: SteelSeries Arctis Nova 1
description: The SteelSeries Arctis Nova 1 delivers high-fidelity audio with the Nova Acoustic System featuring custom-designed speakers. The adjustable ComfortMax headband and lightweight design ensure all-day comfort.

name: Razer Kraken V4 X
description: The Razer Kraken V4 X features 50mm Razer Triforce drivers and a HyperClear cardioid mic for exceptional audio clarity. The lightweight design with memory foam cushions makes it ideal for extended gaming sessions.

name: Logitech G335
description: The Logitech G335 is a lightweight wired gaming headset with a comfortable suspension headband and 40mm neodymium drivers. Perfect for gamers who want quality audio and all-day comfort at an affordable price.

name: Razer Gigantus V2 XXL
description: The Razer Gigantus V2 XXL is a massive mouse pad designed for low-sensitivity gamers who need plenty of space. The micro-textured cloth surface provides optimal balance between speed and control.

name: Razer Firefly V2 Chroma
description: The Razer Firefly V2 is a hard gaming mouse pad with Razer Chroma RGB lighting on the edge. The micro-textured surface provides a smooth gliding experience while the vibrant lighting transforms your desk.

name: Logitech G840 XL
description: The Logitech G840 XL cloth gaming mouse pad provides a large playing surface with consistent texture for precise mouse control. The anti-fray stitched edges ensure long-lasting durability.
features: XL size for mouse and keyboard

name: Cooler Master MP511 XXL
description: The Cooler Master MP511 XXL is a large cloth gaming mouse pad with a micro-weave surface for precise tracking. The anti-slip rubber base keeps it secure during intense gaming sessions.

name: Razer Seiren V3 Mini
description: The Razer Seiren V3 Mini is a compact USB microphone with supercardioid pickup pattern that focuses on your voice and minimizes background noise. Perfect for streamers and remote workers who need clear audio in a tiny package.

name: HyperX DuoCast
description: The HyperX DuoCast USB microphone features dual-pattern recording with both cardioid and omnidirectional modes. The built-in pop filter and anti-vibration shock mount ensure studio-quality recordings.

name: Logitech Yeti GX
description: The Logitech Yeti GX is a premium RGB gaming microphone with Blue Voice broadcast filters and a supercardioid dynamic capsule. Designed for streamers who demand professional audio quality.

name: Rode PodMic
description: The Rode PodMic is a professional dynamic microphone designed for podcasting and streaming. Its internal shock mounting and pop filter deliver rich, broadcast-quality sound with excellent background noise rejection.
specifications: Features: Internal pop filter, Shock mount
features: Internal pop filter and shock mount

name: Logitech C920 HD Pro
description: The Logitech C920 HD Pro is the world's most popular webcam for streaming and video calls. Full HD 1080p video with autofocus and dual microphones delivers clear, professional-quality video.

name: Logitech C922 Pro Stream
description: The Logitech C922 Pro Stream is designed for streamers with 1080p at 30fps or 720p at 60fps. Built-in background replacement and premium autofocus make it ideal for professional streaming.
features: Works with OBS, XSplit, and more

name: Razer Kiyo Pro
description: The Razer Kiyo Pro features a large 1/2.8-inch sensor with STARVIS technology for exceptional low-light performance. Uncompressed 1080p at 60fps delivers stunningly clear video quality.

name: HyperX Clutch Tanto Mini
description: The HyperX Clutch Tanto Mini is a compact wired controller designed for mobile and PC gaming. Its portable form factor and responsive buttons make it the perfect companion for gaming on the go.

name: MSI MAG 255F E20 25" 200Hz Rapid IPS
description: The MSI MAG 255F E20 is a 25-inch Rapid IPS gaming monitor with a lightning-fast 200Hz refresh rate and 0.5ms response time. Designed for competitive gamers who demand ultra-smooth motion clarity.

name: AOC 27G11ZE2 27" Fast IPS 240Hz
description: The AOC 27G11ZE2 is a 27-inch Fast IPS gaming monitor with a blazing 240Hz refresh rate and 0.3ms response time. The ultra-fast panel delivers buttery-smooth gameplay with vibrant colors.

name: Hybrok HG24IFL240 24" IPS 240Hz
description: The Hybrok HG24IFL240 is a 24-inch IPS gaming monitor with an impressive 240Hz refresh rate and 1ms response time. An excellent choice for competitive gaming on a budget.

name: SG Racer Fighter Gaming Chair
description: The SG Racer Fighter is a stylish gaming chair with premium PU leather and high-density foam cushioning. The ergonomic design with adjustable armrests and lumbar support provides comfort during long gaming sessions.

name: SG SGD-140 Carbone Z Gaming Desk
description: The SG SGD-140 Carbone Z is a spacious gaming desk with a carbon fiber textured surface and sturdy steel frame. The 140x70cm surface provides ample space for a multi-monitor gaming setup.

name: SG SGD-L160 Right Noir RGB Desk
description: The SG SGD-L160 Right Noir RGB is a large L-shaped gaming desk with integrated RGB lighting. The 160cm design offers maximum workspace with a dedicated monitor stand area and cable management.

name: Bundle SG SGD-140 Carbone Z + SG Racer Fighter
description: The ultimate gaming setup bundle featuring the SG SGD-140 Carbone Z desk and the SG Racer Fighter chair. Everything you need for a complete gaming station at a great value.
specifications: Includes: SGD-140 Carbone Z Desk + Racer Fighter Chair
features: Great value compared to separate purchase

name: Intel Core i5-12400F Tray
description: The Intel Core i5-12400F is a 6-core, 12-thread processor built on the Alder Lake architecture. With a boost clock of 4.4 GHz and 65W TDP, it delivers excellent gaming performance at a compelling price point.

name: Intel Core i9-14900K Tray
description: The Intel Core i9-14900K is a 24-core, 32-thread flagship processor with boosted clock speeds up to 5.8 GHz. Built for extreme gaming and demanding creative workloads with Raptor Lake Refresh architecture.

name: MSI GeForce RTX 5060 8G Ventus 2X OC
description: The MSI GeForce RTX 5060 Ventus 2X OC delivers next-gen gaming performance with NVIDIA Blackwell architecture. 8GB of GDDR7 memory and advanced ray tracing cores provide stunning visuals and smooth frame rates.

name: Gigabyte GeForce RTX 3050 Windforce OC 6G
description: The Gigabyte RTX 3050 Windforce OC is an entry-level graphics card with NVIDIA Ampere architecture. 6GB of GDDR6 memory and dual Windforce fans deliver reliable 1080p gaming performance.

name: MSI MAG CORELIQUID E360 Watercooling
description: The MSI MAG CORELIQUID E360 is a 360mm all-in-one liquid cooler with a high-performance radiator and three 120mm fans. The ARGB pump head adds customizable lighting to your build.

name: Corsair VENGEANCE LPX 8GB DDR4 3200MHz
description: Corsair VENGEANCE LPX is a high-performance DDR4 memory kit designed for gaming. With 3200MHz speed and low-profile heat spreader, it delivers reliable performance with excellent compatibility.

name: MSI MAG FORGE M100A RGB PC Case
description: The MSI MAG FORGE M100A is a compact mid-tower gaming case with a mesh front panel for optimal airflow. Pre-installed RGB fans and a tempered glass side panel showcase your build in style.

name: Corsair RM850e 80PLUS Gold PSU
description: The Corsair RM850e is a fully modular 850W power supply with 80 PLUS Gold efficiency. The quiet 135mm fan and 105°C-rated capacitors deliver reliable power for high-end gaming systems.

name: MSI SPATIUM S270 240GB SSD
description: The MSI SPATIUM S270 is a reliable 240GB SATA SSD for upgrading your system. With read speeds up to 500 MB/s, it offers a significant performance boost over traditional hard drives.

name: AMD Ryzen 5 7600X Tray
description: The AMD Ryzen 5 7600X is a 6-core, 12-thread processor built on the Zen 4 architecture. With boost clock up to 5.3 GHz and support for DDR5 and PCIe 5.0, it delivers excellent gaming performance.

name: Logitech G Pro X TKL Lightspeed
description: The Logitech G Pro X TKL is a tournament-ready mechanical keyboard with swappable pro-grade GX switches. LIGHTSPEED wireless and a compact tenkeyless layout make it the top choice for esports professionals.

name: Logitech BRIO 100
description: The Logitech BRIO 100 is an affordable Full HD webcam with auto light correction and a built-in privacy shutter. Perfect for streaming, video calls, and content creation.

name: Logitech MX BRIO 4K
description: The Logitech MX BRIO is a premium 4K webcam with advanced features like Show Mode and auto-framing. The 4K sensor delivers stunning video quality with excellent low-light performance.

name: Razer Ornata V3
description: The Razer Ornata V3 features Mecha-Membrane switches for a unique typing feel that combines membrane softness with mechanical click. Full-size layout with Chroma RGB and a plush leatherette wrist rest.

name: Razer Deathadder V2 X HyperSpeed
description: The Razer DeathAdder V2 X HyperSpeed is a wireless ergonomic gaming mouse with up to 615 hours of battery life. Focus Pro 26K sensor and mechanical switches deliver exceptional performance.

name: Razer Kraken X Lite
description: The Razer Kraken X Lite is an ultra-lightweight gaming headset at just 230g. With 40mm drivers and a cardioid microphone, it delivers clear audio and communication for competitive gaming.

name: HyperX Pulsefire Mat Cloth XL
description: The HyperX Pulsefire Mat Cloth XL provides a smooth glide surface with anti-slip rubber base. The XL size accommodates both keyboard and mouse for a cohesive gaming setup.

name: Comet R5 3400G/Vega11/8Go/256Go PC
description: The Comet gaming PC features an AMD Ryzen 5 3400G with integrated Vega 11 graphics, 8GB of RAM, and a 256GB SSD. A perfect entry-level gaming desktop for casual gaming and everyday use.

name: Razer Goliathus Chroma Extended XL
description: The Razer Goliathus Chroma Extended XL is a premium RGB mouse pad with Chroma lighting that covers your entire desk. The micro-textured cloth surface provides excellent tracking for both speed and control.

name: SG G800 Noir RGB Headset
description: The SG G800 is an affordable RGB gaming headset with 50mm drivers and a flexible noise-canceling microphone. Colorful RGB lighting on the ear cups adds style to your gaming setup.

name: AMD Ryzen 7 7700X Tray
description: The AMD Ryzen 7 7700X is an 8-core, 16-thread processor with Zen 4 architecture. With 5.4 GHz boost clock and support for DDR5 and PCIe 5.0, it excels at both gaming and productivity tasks.
features: Great for gaming and content creation

name: Logitech Yeti Orb
description: The Logitech Yeti Orb is a compact RGB microphone with cardioid pickup that focuses on your voice. The eye-catching RGB ring and compact design make it perfect for streamers on a budget.

name: Razer Cobra HyperSpeed
description: The Razer Cobra HyperSpeed is a wireless ambidextrous gaming mouse with Razer HyperSpeed technology. The Focus Pro 30K sensor and optical switches deliver pro-level performance.

name: AOC GM190B/LA Gaming Mouse
description: The AOC GM190B/LA is an affordable entry-level gaming mouse with 4 DPI settings and RGB lighting. Perfect for casual gamers looking for a reliable budget option.

name: HyperX Alloy Rise UK Keyboard
description: The HyperX Alloy Rise is a feature-rich mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable switches and per-key RGB lighting. The aluminum frame and PBT keycaps ensure premium build quality and durability.

name: Logitech G413 TKL SE
description: The Logitech G413 TKL SE is a tenkeyless mechanical keyboard with Logitech GX Blue switches. The compact design saves desk space while delivering responsive mechanical performance.

name: HyperX Cloud Flight 2 Wireless
description: The HyperX Cloud Flight 2 is a wireless gaming headset with up to 60 hours of battery life. 53mm drivers deliver immersive audio while the memory foam cushions provide legendary HyperX comfort.

name: AOC 24B30H3 23.8" IPS 120Hz
description: The AOC 24B30H3 is a 23.8-inch IPS monitor with a smooth 120Hz refresh rate and 1ms response time. The sleek design and vibrant IPS panel make it a great choice for everyday gaming.
features: IPS panel with wide viewing angles

name: MSI MP251 E14L 24.5" 144Hz IPS
description: The MSI PRO MP251 is a 24.5-inch IPS business monitor with a smooth 144Hz refresh rate. Perfect for both productivity and gaming with its fast refresh rate and accurate color reproduction.
